# Raanzlr

> Raanzlr builds practical AI agents, workflow automation, web platforms, and mobile apps for teams in the GCC, MENA, Türkiye, Europe, and the U.S.

Raanzlr is an AI automation and software engineering agency headquartered in New Jersey, USA, serving clients across the Middle East, North Africa, Türkiye, and Europe. Founded in 2023.

## Services

- **AI Chatbots**: Custom Arabic and multilingual AI chatbots and virtual assistants
- **Workflow Automation**: End-to-end business process automation using n8n, Make, and custom pipelines
- **Web Development**: Full-stack web platforms and SaaS applications
- **Mobile Apps**: iOS and Android applications with AI capabilities
- **Custom AI Solutions**: RAG systems, LLM fine-tuning, and bespoke AI models
- **CRM Integration**: Salesforce, HubSpot, and custom CRM automation
- **UI/UX Design**: User experience design with Arabic RTL expertise
- **Consulting**: AI strategy and digital transformation consulting

## Markets

GCC (Saudi Arabia, UAE, Qatar, Kuwait, Bahrain, Oman), Levant (Syria), Türkiye, Europe
